rationale: Add flexibility to trigger nested dict overwrites, list handling, remote sources, raw prompts, and partial replays.

updates.replacement:
extra_context_object
    : '{' (extra_pair (',' extra_pair)*)? '}'
    ;

extra_pair
    : STRING ':' json_value
    ;

json_value
    : STRING
    | extra_object
    | json_array
    ;

extra_object
    : '{' (extra_pair (',' extra_pair)*)? '}'
    ;

json_array
    : '[' (STRING (',' STRING)*)? ']'
    ;

replay_value
    : 'null'
    | '{' '\"cookiecutter\"' ':' '{' replay_pair (',' replay_pair)* '}' '}'
    ;

replay_pair
    : STRING ':' (STRING | json_bool)
    ;
